title: infused pillowy delight jamaican chicken tagine
description: a keto-friendly jamaican dish featuring earthy flavors, pillowy texture and crunchy piccalilli. this show-off tagine is perfect for a dinner party.
instructions: dehydrate onion and red bell pepper in a low oven (150°f) for 2 hours
in a large bowl, combine chicken, allspice, thyme, cinnamon, nutmeg, salt, and black pepper. mix well
heat oil in the tagine pot over medium heat. add chicken and cook until browned on both sides, about 5 minutes
add chopped onion and red bell pepper to the tagine pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes
add tomato paste and cook for 1 minute
add coconut milk and bring to a simmer
reduce heat to low and cook, covered, for 20 minutes or until chicken is cooked through
stir in piccalilli and cook for an additional 2 minutes
serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs, if desired
